item.title: EDPB adopts new GDPR guidelines on data subject rights
item.description: The European Data Protection Board adopted updated guidelines clarifying GDPR Article 15.

item.title: Commission publishes EHDS implementing regulation
item.description: EHDS implementing acts cover secondary use of health data and the MyHealth@EU infrastructure.

item.title: NIS2 transposition status across Member States
item.description: ENISA reports on NIS2 transposition progress and CRA alignment.

item.title: Unrelated press release on agriculture subsidies
item.description: The Commission announced new agricultural subsidy frameworks for 2027.

item.title: AI Act enforcement priorities clarified by the AI Office
item.description: The AI Office set out priorities for AI Act enforcement, focusing on general-purpose AI providers.

item.title: Duplicate: EDPB adopts new GDPR guidelines on data subject rights
item.description: Duplicate item with identical link to test dedupe.
